metadata.description: The claude-code-harness kit — designs, bootstraps, audits, and extends a Claude Code harness (.claude/ + root CLAUDE.md). Opinion: under a capable model, less harness yields more productivity.

plugins.name: claude-code-harness
plugins.description: Designs, bootstraps, audits, and extends a Claude Code harness (.claude/ + root CLAUDE.md). Bootstrap / Audit / Extend / Explain modes + long-running build kit.
